name: Marcus — Returning User with Multiple Trips

steps.name: CreateTrip Moroccan Adventure + UpdateTrip to ACTIVE
steps.details: Created trip f84759f2-bf51-47e7-89f2-4364f6ef660e, updated to TRIP_STATUS_ACTIVE. destinationCountry auto-detected as MA.

steps.name: CreateTrip Greek Islands Hopping (PLANNING)
steps.details: Created trip 2a03e1af-5162-4f9d-b6a4-8584cd503462, status PLANNING. destinationCountry auto-detected as GR.

steps.name: ListTrips — verify 2 trips
steps.details: Returned 2 trips with correct titles, statuses, and destination countries.

steps.name: Selection mode — vague reference matching 'my Greece trip'
steps.details: AI called select_trip with correct trip ID 2a03e1af-5162-4f9d-b6a4-8584cd503462. TripSelected event emitted. Matched 'my Greece trip' to 'Greek Islands Hopping'.

steps.name: Planning mode — create_itinerary_items for Santorini
steps.details: AI called create_itinerary_items with 9 items across 3 days (activities, meals, sightseeing). ItineraryUpdate event emitted with full itinerary. Minor: AI called create_itinerary_items a second time (deduped correctly with 'already_exists' — stutter bug, P2).

steps.name: Trip switching — 'take me to my Morocco trip'
steps.details: AI called select_trip with Morocco trip ID f84759f2-bf51-47e7-89f2-4364f6ef660e. TripSelected event emitted. Correctly recognized trip is ACTIVE (companion mode language).

steps.name: Morocco context — best time to visit Marrakech
steps.details: AI responded with Morocco-specific content (Marrakech, medina, souks, Atlas Mountains, riads). Correctly in companion mode ('Since you're here in April').

steps.name: New trip creation — New Zealand (create_trip NOT select_trip)
steps.details: AI correctly called create_trip (not select_trip) for the new destination. TripCreated event emitted. Trip: 'New Zealand South Island Adventure', destination_country=NZ. Also attempted web_search (gracefully handled no_web_access).

steps.name: ListTrips — verify exactly 3 trips
steps.details: Returned exactly 3 trips: New Zealand South Island Adventure (PLANNING, NZ), Greek Islands Hopping (PLANNING, GR), Moroccan Adventure (ACTIVE, MA).

bugs.title: create_itinerary_items tool called twice in same turn (stutter)
bugs.description: In step 6, the AI called create_itinerary_items with 9 Santorini items, got the result, then called it again with identical items. The dedup logic correctly returned 'already_exists' with 0 created and 9 skipped, so no data corruption. But it wastes a tool loop iteration and tokens.
bugs.reproduction: Send a planning mode message asking about multi-day plans. The AI may call create_itinerary_items, get the result, then re-call with the same items.
bugs.expected: AI should call create_itinerary_items once and move on after seeing the success result.
bugs.actual: AI called create_itinerary_items twice with identical payloads. Second call correctly deduped (0 created, 9 skipped).

ai_behavior_issues.title: Duplicate tool call stutter in itinerary creation
ai_behavior_issues.description: Same as bug R03-001. The AI issued the same create_itinerary_items call twice. The dedup logic in the backend handled it gracefully, but it adds latency to the response and consumes extra tokens.
ai_behavior_issues.suggestion: Consider adding a system prompt instruction: 'After create_itinerary_items returns successfully, do NOT call it again with the same items. Confirm to the user what was added.'

usefulness_notes.trip_creation: All 3 trips created correctly. create_trip vs select_trip distinction handled perfectly — AI created NZ trip instead of trying to select a non-existent one.
usefulness_notes.itinerary_quality: Excellent 3-day Santorini itinerary: 9 items with detailed descriptions, time estimates, local tips, restaurant reservation warnings. Mix of activities, meals, and sightseeing.
usefulness_notes.companion_mode: Morocco companion mode response was contextually aware ('Since you're here in April') with practical local knowledge about seasons, temperature, and cultural context.
usefulness_notes.overall: Core multi-trip workflow works flawlessly: vague reference matching ('my Greece trip' → 'Greek Islands Hopping'), trip switching, new trip creation vs selection. The only issue is a P2 tool call stutter that was handled gracefully by backend dedup.

key_test_results.vague_reference_matching: PASS — 'my Greece trip' correctly matched to 'Greek Islands Hopping'
key_test_results.trip_switching: PASS — 'take me to my Morocco trip' correctly switched to Moroccan Adventure
key_test_results.create_vs_select: PASS — New Zealand request correctly used create_trip, not select_trip
key_test_results.context_awareness: PASS — AI maintained correct trip context after switching (Morocco companion mode, not Greece)
key_test_results.multi_trip_management: PASS — 3 trips coexist with correct statuses and destinations
